variants.title: Fleetguard AS2474 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SAC-57010
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AS2474 air oil separator prevents oil build-up, protects against detonation, and minimizes oil loss which equates to reduced maintenance and more consistent performance.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OV 6081 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SAC-57010
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OV 6081 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SAC-57010. Easy to install and replace, the OV 6081 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
